phrases.intent_en: Ask if visitors can climb the detached bell tower
phrases.text_local: Est-il possible de monter dans le clocher pour la vue ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL poh-SEEBL duh mohn-TAY dahn luh kloh-SHAY poor lah VYU
phrases.cultural_note: The freestanding flèche (spire) of Saint-Michel is the tallest tower in southwest France at 114 metres and can be climbed in summer months.

responses.english: Yes, the entrance is next door.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the Sunday flea market outside the basilica
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure commence le marché aux puces devant la basilique le dimanche ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur koh-MAHNS luh mar-SHAY oh PYOOS duh-VAHN lah bah-ZEE-leek luh dee-MAHNSH
phrases.cultural_note: A lively flea market and antiques market takes place around the basilica on Sunday mornings, drawing dealers and bargain hunters from across the region.

responses.english: Sunday morning, all around the square.
responses.phonetic: luh dee-MAHNSH mah-TEHN, too oh-TOOR duh lah PLAHS
responses.local: Le dimanche matin, tout autour de la place.

phrases.intent_en: Ask a vendor at the market if an item is genuine antique
phrases.text_local: Est-ce que cet objet est véritablement ancien ?
phrases.pronunciation: es-kuh set ob-ZHAY eh vay-ree-TAB-luh-MAHN ahn-SYAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Saint-Michel area has a long tradition as Bordeaux's multicultural quarter, known for its lively street life and antique trade.

responses.english: I don't know, but it's old.
responses.phonetic: zhuh nuh seh PAH, meh seh ahn-SYEHN
responses.local: Je ne sais pas, mais c'est ancien.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what time the basilica closes
phrases.text_local: À quelle heure ferme la basilique ?
phrases.pronunciation: ah kel ur FAIRM lah bah-ZEE-leek
phrases.cultural_note: The basilica is a Gothic masterpiece begun in the 14th century and is listed as a UNESCO World Heritage site.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if the bell tower has an elevator
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il un ascenseur dans la tour ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee ah-TEEL uhn ah-sahn-SUHR dahn lah TOOR
phrases.cultural_note: The detached bell tower (Flèche Saint-Michel) requires climbing on foot. There is no elevator.

responses.english: No, you have to walk up.
responses.phonetic: nohn, eel foh mohn-TAY ah PYAY
responses.local: Non, il faut monter à pied.
